claim_boundary: This source-audit record verifies public availability of the Google DeepMind Model Cards page at access time, page metadata and SHA-256 only. It does not verify model safety, model quality, benchmark performance, runtime behavior or deployment readiness.
known_limitations: This is a source-boundary audit only.
No model quality, safety, benchmark-performance or deployment-readiness claim is made.
No legal conclusion is made about reuse rights.
raw_payload_policy: Raw page content is not committed; only URL, status, content type, expected-token presence, byte size and SHA-256 are recorded.
